ogTitle: North Tumbulgum vs North Turramurra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Tumbulgum and North Turramurra.
heading: North Tumbulgum vs North Turramurra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Tumbulgum, New South Wales and North Turramurra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Tumbulgum has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to North Turramurra (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Tumbulgum or North Turramurra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Tumbulgum has a flood risk score of 36/100, while North Turramurra scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Tumbulgum scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. North Turramurra scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Tumbulgum or North Turramurra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Tumbulgum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
